gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.circuitId) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Italy'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(circuits.circuitId) FROM races JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId WHERE circuits.country = 'Italy';
question: How many Formula_1 races took place on the circuits in Italy?
